USDC is now linked between HyperCore and HyperEVM. This is a major milestone in allowing secure, natively minted cross chain USDC deposits directly to HyperCore. In the final state, the Arbitrum bridge will be deprecated and all USDC will be natively minted. There are many https://t.co/0g8fTCgkVl

During this transition phase, USDC transfers from HyperCore to HyperEVM (including HyperEVM and CCTP USDC “withdrawal” options) may fail if there is insufficient balance on HyperEVM. If a transfer/withdrawal to HyperEVM fails, the funds are still safe and remain in HyperCore.
